title: narcissus patulus subsp. ricasolianus
intro: Narcissus patulus subsp. ricasolianus, also known as the Ricasoli daffodil, is a subspecies of the narcissus plant, a type of flowering bulbous perennial native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as skin infections and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Narcissus patulus subsp. ricasolianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
